headline: Why Is Wall Street Betting Big On RKLB Stock?
summary: Here’s the real story behind Rocket Lab’s astronomical one-year run, and it has nothing to do with a single earnings report. If you held Rocket Lab (RKLB) over the past year, congratulations. You’ve probably stopped checking your brokerage account out of sheer vertigo. The stock’s +265% return vastly outpaced the S&P 500’s respectable +24% gain, leaving its defense-giant peers like LMT (+13.2%) and NOC (+13.4%) sitting on the launchpad.
